---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new option, macro, language translation, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

Describe the concrete situation where the missing feature would help.
Good: "When writing letters in Portuguese there is no infoblock translation, so labels fall back to German."
Bad: "It would be nice to have more options."

## Proposed solution

How should the feature work from the user's perspective?
Show a usage example if possible:

```latex
\documentclass[..., newfeature]{onlinebrief24}
\setnewmacro{value}
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you already tried, or alternative approaches you considered.

## Scope

Does this feature fit the project's focus on DIN 5008 type-B letters for onlinebrief24.de?
If the feature is more general, explain why it belongs in this class rather than user preamble code.
